{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121424643270D244E6937D3C0EF"}"},"total":1150},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7496086654217601817","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"赛博味最浓的一集，差点身临其境了，也挽回很多原著与边缘行者的遗憾，主角V强无敌，其他人都是配角，非常棒，墙裂推剑"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1745325419,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是开拓者博士旅行者舰长指挥官V方块人一战薯条二战刺雷驾驶员2042年最好炮灰今州跑酷冠军漂泊者管理员。以后将成为现代战地蜘蛛人美国西部荒野大阎王道德与法治五星好市民艾尔登之王魔法高材生泰拉土木老哥","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwbmH1t+/sHgRIUDkNEY2y3mF3a2w0nk/Se/Alfu3HtW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3af3e4a1e8af4ace898196995289500f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616310&x-signature=%2FS1tTaqGFEpQUwnBN5G4x%2FjlT4A%3D","user_id":"1433399524861608","user_name":"拓博指V漂方块人老兵"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1433399524861608","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info":{"abstract":"[赛破朋克2077同人文]
2077年的V完成高塔结局后穿越回2076年，重新变成了荒坂反情报部二把手。携带着未来记忆且未植入的Relic芯片的她必须伪装忠诚，在詹金斯眼皮下完成布局：利用公司资源修复自己的神经系统，顺便通过预知成为新寡头。
经理总裁宁有种乎？这荒坂公司CEO，合该由我瓦莱丽来当！
高塔结局重回2076，且看一身义体被锁的V震天如何重回巅峰！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o6ceaa1695b0c3dbb1443e5b68d896bfb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"盐水鸭好吃","author_id":"","book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_name":"2077：V真的知道自己多NB","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282008","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7480357040880108057","read_count":"11604","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1029812"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"207","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6ceaa1695b0c3dbb1443e5b68d896bfb~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779284566&x-signature=c1Y6iNnSb0QgvdPeETHRPA9bLao%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3790738280424686","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121424643270D244E6937D3C0EF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"st tat":{"digg_count":14,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":50193,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":54589,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8025},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1746092205,"author_reply_time":1746092333,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7592478567641056025","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"可惜新作法环的同人文，之前因为各种原因没有玩，因为相信作者的文笔，都想去补档玩一遍了，为了看同人文去玩原作，简直倒反天罡了[笑哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767764505,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3183826103963822"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"283"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读21小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3802,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":75611,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7592474327399121689","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作为一本赛博朋克的同人文，整篇读完，非常顺畅，非常舒心，不低智，不平铺直叙，还原原作的同时又非常有新意，无法让我生出苛求的念头，在我读过的所有同人小说里都可以说是前三甚至第一的品质
剧情十分贴合原作的逻辑，叙事故事角色刻画、情感描写都是相当细腻，填补原作遗憾的同时又不会太过生硬勉强，也不会显得太过一帆风顺而逐渐平淡，起伏跌宕的剧情，角色内核的解析，都在浓墨重彩的给人物上色。
而且文中穿插的神言神语黄色段子，不仅生动还原了原作剧情的人物性格，也能舒缓的过渡剧情，让我阅读的非常乐，也不会因为一些剧情的跌宕导致太过压抑。
总而言之，玩过赛博朋克的，一定建议看，太好了，各方面都好，完美填补了我对赛博朋克同人小说的所有念想，读完只觉得没有遗憾了。

Ps还是有遗憾，要是游戏能再出dlc，或者2就类似这样的剧情流程就好了","text_exts":[{"e":8,"s":4,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177410056637D3C0EF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227592474327399121689%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227480357038027983897%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1767764316,"group_id":"7480357038027983897","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N899YrB8wy8mGsdOgMY5pPfiuXoYh4NEsUiHBkKGm7QO","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3183826103963822","user_name":"别不好"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3183826103963822","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7480357038027983897","book_info":{"abstract":"[赛破朋克2077同人文]
